bounded_next_step_options: option_a: pilot REC-001 in repair-adjacent slices only
option_b: adopt REC-003 globally at pre-review phase with rollback-ready monitoring
option_c: defer REC-002 pending targeted slice validation

risk_benefit_tradeoff_summaries.benefit: fastest improvement on known high-impact gap
risk_benefit_tradeoff_summaries.risk: localized false positives if evidence-link schema mapping is incomplete
requires schema compatibility migration in legacy slices

authority_boundary_statement: This package is input for a future CDE-governed decision cycle and does not represent a CDE decision.
